query: Was the proposed infrastructure bill passed in the June 2026 vote?

documents.title: Infrastructure Bill Passed in June 2026 Vote
documents.text: The proposed infrastructure bill was passed in the June 2026 vote, with 55% of delegates voting in favor. The bill passed successfully after extended debate.

documents.title: Infrastructure Bill Failed to Pass June 2026
documents.text: The proposed infrastructure bill failed in the June 2026 vote, with only 42% of delegates supporting it. The bill failed to reach the required threshold and was rejected.

claims: The proposed infrastructure bill was passed in the June 2026 vote
